info.title: US Patent & Trademark Office
info.description: Search and retrieve bibliographic data for patent applications.

contact.name: United States Patent and Trademark Office

get.summary: Search patent applications using query parameters
get.description: Returns up to 25 patent applications matching optional filters, fields, sort, and facets.
get.x-ms-summary: Search patent applications via query parameters

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search text string supporting Boolean, range, and wildcard syntax.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Field and sort order (e.g., filingDate asc).

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Record offset position.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of records to return.

parameters.name: facets
parameters.description: Comma-separated fields to facet upon.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in results.

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: Filter records by field name and value.

parameters.name: rangeFilters
parameters.description: Range filters for numeric or date fields.

post.description: Retrieve patent application data using structured JSON payload.
post.x-ms-summary: Search patent applications using JSON payload

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: JSON payload defining search criteria, filters, sort order, and pagination.

q.description: Search query string supporting boolean operators and wildcards.

get.description: Download patent data using query parameters. Defaults to JSON format.
get.x-ms-summary: Download patent data using query parameters

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: A search query string supporting boolean operators (AND, OR, NOT), wildcards (*), and exact phrases ("").

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Field to sort by followed by sort direction.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Record offset to begin from.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response.

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: Filter data by providing field name and value.

parameters.name: rangeFilters
parameters.description: Filter data by numeric or date range.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Output format of download (json or csv).

post.description: Download patent application data by supplying JSON search payload.
post.x-ms-summary: Download patent data using JSON payload

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: JSON payload defining search criteria, filters, sort order, and download format.

get.description: Retrieve detailed bibliographic data for a specified patent application number. Application numbers containing special characters (e.g. `PCT/BR00/000001`) must be UTF-8 encoded.
get.x-ms-summary: Retrieve a patent application by number

parameters.name: applicationNumberText
parameters.description: Patent application number (UTF-8 encoded if special characters present).

get.description: Retrieve metadata details for a specified patent application number, including bibliographic and file wrapper data.
get.x-ms-summary: Retrieve metadata for a patent application

parameters.name: applicationNumberText
parameters.description: Patent application number for which metadata is requested.

get.description: Retrieve patent term adjustment details for a specific application number, including extensions and delay information.

parameters.name: applicationNumberText
parameters.description: Patent application number for which term adjustment information is requested.

get.description: Retrieve assignment and ownership transfer information for a specific patent application number.
get.x-ms-summary: Retrieve assignment details for a patent application

parameters.name: applicationNumberText
parameters.description: Patent application number for which assignment information is requested.

get.description: Retrieve attorney or agent representation details for a specific patent application number.

parameters.name: applicationNumberText
parameters.description: Patent application number for which attorney or agent information is requested.

200.description: Successful response with attorney or agent data

get.description: Retrieve parent and child continuity relationships for a specified patent application number, including continuations, divisionals, and continuations-in-part.
get.x-ms-summary: Retrieve parent and child continuity data

parameters.name: applicationNumberText
parameters.description: Patent application number for which continuity data is requested.

get.description: Retrieve foreign priority details for a specific patent application, including foreign filing numbers, countries, and filing dates.
get.x-ms-summary: Retrieve foreign priority data for a patent application

parameters.name: applicationNumberText
parameters.description: Patent application number for which foreign priority data is requested.

200.description: Successful response with foreign priority data

get.description: Retrieve a chronological list of prosecution events and transactions for a specific patent application number.
get.x-ms-summary: Retrieve transaction history for a patent application

parameters.name: applicationNumberText
parameters.description: Patent application number for which transaction history is requested.

get.summary: Get document metadata for a patent application
get.description: Retrieve details of documents filed or issued for a specific patent application number, including office actions, responses, and fee worksheets.
get.x-ms-summary: Retrieve document list for a patent application

parameters.name: applicationNumberText
parameters.description: Patent application number for which document details are requested.

parameters.name: documentCodes
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of document codes to filter results.

parameters.name: officialDateFrom
parameters.description: Start of date range for document official date (yyyy-MM-dd).

parameters.name: officialDateTo
parameters.description: End of date range for document official date (yyyy-MM-dd).

get.summary: Get associated publication and grant document metadata
get.description: Retrieve metadata for associated publication (PGPub) and grant documents linked to a specific patent application number.
get.x-ms-summary: Retrieve associated publication and grant metadata

parameters.name: applicationNumberText
parameters.description: Patent application number for which associated publication and grant documents are requested.

200.description: Successful response with associated document metadata

get.description: Search and filter patent application status codes and descriptions using query parameters. All parameters are optional. Returns top 25 results by default.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: A search string supporting boolean operators (AND, OR, NOT), wildcards (*), and exact phrases ("").

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Position in the dataset of a particular record.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limit the number of results returned.

post.summary: Search patent application status codes via JSON payload
post.description: Perform advanced search for patent application status codes using a structured JSON payload. All fields in the request are optional.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: JSON payload defining search filters and pagination.

get.description: Retrieve available USPTO bulk datasets with optional filters and search parameters.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: A search query string supporting boolean operators (AND, OR, NOT), wildcards (*), and exact phrases (""). Example: `decisionTypeCodeDescriptionText:Denied OR finalDecidingOfficeName:OFFICE`

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Field to sort results by (e.g., `petitionMailDate asc`).

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Position in the dataset of the first record to return.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

parameters.name: facets
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to group (facet) results by.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response.

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: Field-value filters separated by space. Example: `technologyCenter 3600` or `businessEntityStatusCategory 'Small'`.

parameters.name: rangeFilters
parameters.description: Specify numeric or date range filters using `:` separator. Example: `petitionMailDate 2021-01-01:2025-01-01`

get.summary: Get bulk dataset product by identifier
get.description: Retrieve details for a specific USPTO bulk dataset product by its short name (productIdentifier). Optional parameters allow filtering by date range and inclusion of product files.
get.x-ms-summary: Get bulk dataset product by identifier

parameters.name: productIdentifier
parameters.description: Short name of the bulk dataset product (e.g. BDSS_PETITIONS_2024).

parameters.name: fileDataFromDate
parameters.description: Start date (inclusive) to filter dataset files by date.

parameters.name: fileDataToDate
parameters.description: End date (inclusive) to filter dataset files by date.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of product file records to skip.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of product file records to return.

parameters.name: includeFiles
parameters.description: Set to true to include detailed file records in the response; false to omit them.

parameters.name: latest
parameters.description: Set to true to return only the latest product file for this dataset.

get.description: Retrieve petition decision data by providing query parameters.   Query parameters are optional—if none are supplied, the top 25 records are returned.
get.x-ms-summary: Search petition decisions using query parameters

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Query string supporting Boolean operators (AND, OR, NOT), wildcards (*), and exact phrases ("").

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Field name followed by sort direction (asc or desc).

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Position in the dataset of the first record to return.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return.

parameters.name: facets
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to facet upon.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response.

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: Filter results by supplying a field name and value.

parameters.name: rangeFilters
parameters.description: Filter results by providing numeric or date ranges.

post.description: Retrieve petition decision data using a structured JSON payload.   Supports Boolean search, filters, range filters, sorting, field selection, and pagination.
post.x-ms-summary: Search petition decisions using JSON payload

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Petition decision search criteria in JSON format.

get.description: Retrieve petition decision data by supplying query parameters. Supports optional query parameters and returns the top 25 results by default.
get.x-ms-summary: Download petition decision data using query parameters

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: A search query string that accepts Boolean operators (AND, OR, NOT), wildcards (*), and exact phrases ("").

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Field name followed by sort order (asc or desc).

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Dataset position to begin the response from.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the result.

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: Filter the results by field name and value.   Example: `decisionTypeCodeDescriptionText DENIED`

parameters.name: rangeFilters
parameters.description: Filter by numeric or date ranges.   Example: `petitionMailDate 2021-01-01:2025-01-01`

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Format of the returned dataset (json or csv).

post.description: Download petition decision data by supplying a structured JSON payload. The response supports JSON or CSV format, based on the `format` parameter.
post.x-ms-summary: Download petition decision data using JSON payload

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: JSON payload defining filters, ranges, and format options for petition decision data.

get.description: Retrieve detailed petition decision information by its unique petition decision record identifier. Optionally include decision documents in the response using the `includeDocuments` query parameter.
get.x-ms-summary: Get petition decision details by identifier

parameters.name: petitionDecisionRecordIdentifier
parameters.description: Unique petition decision record identifier.

parameters.name: includeDocuments
parameters.description: Set to `true` to include petition decision documents in the response, or `false` to omit them.

post.summary: Convert text into structured patent search query
post.description: Extracts key searchable fields, keywords, and metadata from raw text to create a structured query compatible with `/api/v1/patent/applications/search`.   Useful for transforming plain text from abstracts, claims, or invention descriptions into field-aware searches.
post.x-ms-summary: Convert text into structured patent search query

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Text input for conversion into a structured USPTO search query.

applicationNumberText.description: Free format of the application number

totalDays.description: Total patent term adjustment days granted

aDelayDays.description: Number of days delayed under USPTO A delay category

bDelayDays.description: Number of days delayed under USPTO B delay category

cDelayDays.description: Number of days delayed under USPTO C delay category

overlapDays.description: Days overlapping between categories, subtracted from total

status.description: Current status of patent term adjustment calculation

reelNumber.description: Reel number identifying the recorded assignment

attorneyDocketNumber.description: Attorney docket number associated with the application

attorneyName.description: Name of the attorney of record

registrationNumber.description: USPTO registration number for the attorney or agent

lawFirmName.description: Law firm or organization representing the applicant

emailAddress.description: Contact email for attorney or agent

effectiveDate.description: Effective date for attorney of record entry

status.description: Current status of attorney or agent record

foreignCountryCode.description: Two-letter ISO country code for foreign filing

internationalFilingIndicator.description: Indicates if the filing was international (PCT)

translationRequired.description: Indicates whether a translation is required

eventCode.description: Code or label for the prosecution event

fileSize.description: File size in bytes of associated document, if any

documentCode.description: Code identifying the type of document

officialDate.description: Official date associated with the document

createDate.description: Date document was created in system

fileSize.description: File size of the document in bytes

documentUrl.description: URL for retrieving or downloading the document

documentPageCount.description: Number of pages in the document

artUnit.description: Art unit responsible for the document

publicationNumber.description: Publication number for the pre-grant publication

applicantName.description: Applicant or assignee listed on publication

documentUrl.description: URL to retrieve the granted patent document

StatusCodeSearchResponse.description: Response structure for patent status code search results.

patentFileWrapperDataBag.description: Array of patent status code records.

applicationStatusCode.description: Unique numeric or alphanumeric status code.

statusEffectiveDate.description: Effective date of this status code.

statusTerminationIndicator.description: Indicates whether the status represents termination of prosecution.

requestIdentifier.description: Unique request identifier for tracing API calls.
Unique ID for the entire API call.

StatusCodeSearchRequest.description: JSON payload used to search patent application status codes and their descriptions.

q.description: Search query supporting boolean operators (AND, OR, NOT), wildcards (*), and exact phrases (""). Matches across status code and description fields.

filters.description: Optional filters to narrow results by field values.

value.description: List of filter values for the specified field.

rangeFilters.description: Optional range filters for numeric or date fields.

field.description: Field name for the range filter.

sort.description: Sorting criteria for the returned results.

pagination.description: Pagination settings to control result offset and limit.

offset.description: Offset of the first record to return.

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return.

BdssResponseProductBag.description: Detailed response for a specific USPTO bulk dataset product.

count.description: Number of product file records returned.

patentFileWrapperDataBag.description: Array containing product metadata and optional file details.

productIdentifier.description: Unique identifier for the dataset product (short name).

productDescription.example: Petitions data including application numbers, petition types, and outcomes.

productType.description: Dataset file type (e.g., XML, JSON, CSV).

recordCount.description: Number of records in the dataset.

downloadUrl.description: Direct link to download the dataset.

includeFiles.description: Whether product files were included in the response.

productFiles.description: List of associated dataset files (if included).

fileDataDate.description: Date associated with the file’s dataset content.

fileUrl.description: Direct link to download the file.

BdssResponseBag.description: Response structure for USPTO Bulk DataSet Search results.

productName.description: Human-readable name of the dataset product.

productDescription.example: Petitions data including application numbers and outcomes.

productType.description: Type of dataset (e.g., XML, JSON, CSV).

recordCount.description: Number of records available in the dataset.

checksum.description: SHA or MD5 checksum for dataset file verification.

requestIdentifier.description: Unique request identifier for the API call.

PetitionDecisionSearchRequest.description: JSON payload for searching petition decisions.

q.description: Search text with Boolean operators or field-based queries.

rangeFilters.description: Array of date or numeric range filters.

fields.description: List of fields to include in the response.

facets.description: List of field names to generate facets for.

petitionDecisionRecordIdentifier.description: Unique identifier for the petition decision record.

patentNumber.description: Patent number associated with the petition.

finalDecidingOfficeName.description: Name of the final deciding office.

technologyCenter.description: Technology center associated with the petition.

requestIdentifier.description: Unique identifier for the API request.

PetitionDecisionDownloadRequest.description: JSON payload for downloading petition decision data.   Similar to the search request but allows specifying the output format.

q.description: Query string with Boolean or field-based search.

rangeFilters.description: List of date or numeric range filters.

fields.description: Fields to include in the output.

PetitionDecisionIdentifierResponseBag.description: Response object containing petition decision details for a specific identifier.

petitionDecisionRecordIdentifier.description: Unique identifier for the petition decision record.

patentNumber.description: Patent number associated with the petition decision.

finalDecidingOfficeName.description: Name of the office or division that made the final decision.

petitionDecisionDocuments.description: List of decision document metadata (included if `includeDocuments=true`).

requestIdentifier.description: Unique identifier for the API request.

text.description: The input text to be analyzed for extraction of searchable patent fields and keywords.
text.example: An apparatus for desalinating seawater using graphene-based membranes and low-pressure systems.

TextToSearchResponse.description: Response containing extracted keywords, inferred fields, and a formatted query.

originalText.description: Original input text submitted by the user.
originalText.example: An apparatus for desalinating seawater using graphene-based membranes.

extractedKeywords.description: List of identified key terms from the input text.

inferredFields.description: List of inferred patent search fields and their possible values.

formattedQuery.description: A USPTO-compatible search string formatted for use in `/api/v1/patent/applications/search`.
